queries.question: Provide a list of all novels and also list poems that are written in Italian.
queries.sql:
SELECT Literatures.Title 
FROM Literatures
WHERE Literatures.LiteratureType = "Novel" OR Literatures.LiteratureType = "Poem" AND Literatures.Language = "Italian"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?literatures a :Literatures .
  ?literatures p:Title ?title .
  ?literatures p:LiteratureType ?literaturetype_w .
  ?literatures p:LiteratureType ?literaturetype_w2 .
  ?literatures p:Language ?language_w .
  FILTER((STR(?literaturetype_w) = "Novel" || (STR(?literaturetype_w2) = "Poem" && STR(?language_w) = "Italian")))
}

queries.question: Show novels and poems that are written in Italian.
queries.sql:
SELECT Literatures.Title 
FROM Literatures
WHERE (Literatures.LiteratureType = "Novel" OR Literatures.LiteratureType = "Poem") AND Literatures.Language = "Italian"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?literatures a :Literatures .
  ?literatures p:Title ?title .
  ?literatures p:LiteratureType ?literaturetype_w .
  ?literatures p:LiteratureType ?literaturetype_w2 .
  ?literatures p:Language ?language_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?literaturetype_w) = "Novel" || STR(?literaturetype_w2) = "Poem")) && STR(?language_w) = "Italian"))
}
